name: Mushroom Stuffing[for 12-pound Turkey]
recipeIngredient: 24 bread crumbs from a loaf of white bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mushrooms and trim them. Chop the caps and stems. This will yield about 5 1/2 cups.
2. Trim the onions and slice them. This will yield about 6 cups.
3. Sauté the mushrooms and onions in butter in a large frying pan for 10 minutes, or until wilted. Pour over the bread crumbs in a large bowl. Sprinkle with salt and toss lightly until evenly moist. This makes approximately 10 cups, which is enough to stuff a 12-pound turkey.
Source: Family Circle Illustrated Library of Cooking
